G1_chapter_position_trajectory.rule: PASS if 3/3 books peak at q2 (penultimate) or q3 (final); PASS_PARTIAL at 2/3.

G3_per_kind_ordering_top2.rule: PASS if top-2 ordered tuple agrees in 3/3 books.

G4_top15_set_intersection_size.rule: PASS if >= 10 shared tokens across all 3 books.

G5_per_character_co_occurrence.rule: Per character, ratio = char-magic-density / book-overall-density. PASS if 3/3 chars elevated >=2x in >= 2/3 books.

crystal_shard.first_sentence: Such was the case that night in a land a thousand miles from Akar Kessell and Crenshinibon.
And Errtu had come so close to possessing it!

halflings_gem.first_sentence: The silver dragon rolled over onto its back lazily, riding the morning winds with its legs - all four - crossed over it and its sleepy eyes half closed.
"The boy did nothing wrong," Wulfgar snarled at him.
"I thought ye had forgot me," Catti-brie said as the rowboat approached.

streams_of_silver.first_sentence: "Go to them. Show them the stair," Dendybar commanded.
Oil found its way in through the seams in Shimmergloom's scales, carrying the fire to the dragon flesh.
The great dragons are the preternatural beast, the basic element of the beast, that darkest part of our imagination.
